componentDescription: A versatile UI component for selecting a single value or range from a predefined set by dragging a thumb.

min.description: Defines the minimum allowed value for the slider.

max.description: Defines the maximum allowed value for the slider.

value.description: The current controlled value of the slider.

defaultValue.description: The initial uncontrolled value of the slider.

step.description: The step increment for the slider's value.

stepValues.description: An array of specific values the slider can snap to.

shape.description: Defines the visual shape of the slider's elements (e.g., round, square).

size.description: Defines the overall size of the slider component.

variant.description: Specifies the visual style or variant of the slider.

orientation.description: Defines whether the slider is horizontal or vertical.

isDisabled.description: Indicates if the slider is disabled and non-interactive.

showValue.description: Determines whether the current slider value should be displayed.

showTooltip.description: Determines whether a tooltip showing the value appears on hover/drag.

label.description: A label to associate with the slider.

helperText.description: Supplementary text to provide additional context or guidance.

onChange.description: Callback function invoked when the slider's value changes.

onDrag.description: Callback function invoked during a slider drag operation.

views.description: Custom styles for different parts of the slider component.

shadow.description: Props for rendering a shadow effect for the slider.

ariaLabel.description: An ARIA label for accessibility purposes.
